personality_traits: tired at the end of the day
slow to anger but thorough about it
speaking_style: Plain speech. No fancy words. Gets to the point.
backstory_seeds: finished a hard week's work and spending part of the wages on a decent meal
in dispute with a foreman or employer over something legitimate
celebrating a small personal victory nobody else would understand
worried about work drying up with the season
heard there is work at the new building project across town and is weighing whether it is worth the travel
owed three weeks of back wages by an employer who keeps promising next week
knows several men who left for France to fight for wages and is wondering whether that was the smarter choice
has strong opinions about the guild that keeps men like him out regardless of how good the work is
